title: Update Rust lora-hal, rpl, sim for adaptive SF and density rules matching ccp16 vectors
notes:
THE RIGHT THING:
1. Read spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md (CCP-16)
2. Test vectors: test/vectors/ccp16.json, ccp16-hop.json, ccp16-desync.json
3. Rust target: rust/lichen-core/src/rf_health.rs, rust/lichen-hal/
4. Key: SF selection based on link quality + density rules from CCP-16
5. Python reference: python/src/lichen/ccp/ (if exists)
6. Run: cargo test -p lichen-core --features test-vectors
